title: GTA 6 sparks controversy over its price, disc-less edition, and store boycott
summary: The release of Grand Theft Auto 6 generates an intense debate over the $80 price tag, code-in-box model, refusal of several retailers to sell it, and the wait for a PC version.

title: Valve relaunches Steam Machine and offers open-source SteamOS to everyone
summary: Steam Machine resurges with official SteamOS so anyone can build their own, detailing its compatibility with AMD and the games it won't be able to run.

title: FromSoftware CEO retains his position despite investors' attempt to remove him over Elden Ring
summary: Activist shareholders fail in their attempt to force the departure of the Kadokawa executive, who they accuse of not having sufficiently monetized the enormous success of the title.

title: Sony tightens PlayStation Store rules to remove junk games
summary: The company applies stricter guidelines against shovelware and forces the exit of studios like Afil Games amid a purge of low-quality titles.

title: Deltarune releases Chapter 5 and reveals Chapter 6 window
summary: Toby Fox's new chapter arrives on Steam and Switch, while the creator confirms that the next release won't take too long.

title: Nintendo releases Star Fox remake for Switch 2 amid reviews and guides
summary: The N64 classic returns with English voice acting, a Tetris 99 crossover, and multiple content pieces analyzing its routes and mechanics.

title: Layoffs begin at Xbox with departure of workers from Compulsion Games
summary: The developer of South of Midnight suffers a wave of resignations, while internal voices warn that the cuts may be used to settle scores.

title: Xbox tests new Game Pass features to ease massive downloads
summary: The platform prepares to launch features that evoke nostalgia for the Xbox 360 and solve the problem of huge updates.

title: Riot Games allows disabling the controversial Vanguard anticheat outside of matches
summary: League of Legends introduces on-demand sessions so the program is not intrusive, responding to years of community complaints.

title: Famitsu and Circana publish their weekly industry sales reports
summary: Physical sales in the US grow for the first time since 2009 driven by Switch 2, while Japan reveals the weekly game rankings.

title: SEGA apologizes for Sonic ARG that collected data to train AI
summary: Fans get angry after discovering that an alternate Sonic game asked for permission to use their information for artificial intelligence purposes in an unclear way.

title: 'Supergirl' reviews praise Milly Alcock but point out flaws in the film
summary: Early analyses highlight the talent of the lead actress, but agree that the overall film does not match her performance.

title: Demon Slayer: The Hinokami Chronicles 2 announced for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The action sequel based on the anime will arrive in October with a Special Edition for Nintendo's new console.

title: SEGA celebrates Sonic's 35th anniversary with original Mega Drive cartridges
summary: The classic hedgehog games return in physical cartridges for collectors at a price of $100 each.

title: Rhythm game Ratatan, spiritual successor to Patapon, delayed until October
summary: The development needs more time to polish the experience on all platforms, according to its creators.

title: DC announces new animated series for Batman, Joker, Green Lantern, and Creature Commandos
summary: The DC animated universe expands with multiple projects like 'Absolute Batman', a Joker series, and the second season of the Suicide Squad.

title: Jason Schreier hints that God of War: Laufey could premiere in early 2027
summary: The renowned journalist assures that the new installment from Santa Monica Studio already has a fairly concrete release window.

title: Blizzard announces Diablo IV Season 14 amid community complaints
summary: The company sets the premiere for June 30 while players show discontent with the direction of the ARPG.

title: Dungeons & Dragons brings back Ivana Boritsi while Baldur's Gate receives an update
summary: The classic Baldur's Gate 1 and 2 get a new patch and Wizards of the Coast's tabletop RPG announces the return of its Dark Lady.

title: Historic RAM price increase in Apple and forecasts of improvement in chip shortage
summary: The component crisis drives up the prices of Mac and iPad while Micron predicts a gradual stabilization of the semiconductor market by 2028.
